mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment methods, API helpers, or page objects for enrollment flow. The batch contains only test_suite_matrix.json which is a test configuration file with no executable code, page objects, or API helpers.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires subscription verification methods or API helpers. The batch contains only test configuration data with no verification methods or API utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires subscription status verification methods or API helpers. The batch contains only test configuration data with no verification methods or API utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires page objects, locators, and action methods for pause plan functionality. The batch contains only test configuration data with no page objects, locators, or action methods.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: This batch contains only one file: test_suite_matrix.json, which is a JSON configuration file defining test suite execution configurations for the AURA framework. This file contains 540 test configurations across 6 suite categories (smoke, high_regression, medium_regression, low_regression, regression, regression_visual) with parameters like FLOW, MODE, STACK, LOCALE, PAYMENT_METHOD, PRINTER_PROFILE, etc. However, this is purely a configuration/data file with NO executable code, NO page objects, NO locators, NO action methods, NO verification methods, NO helper classes, NO API utilities, and NO constants that can be reused for test automation. The test case C44873414 requires: (1) Page objects for PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage and InstantInkDashboardPage, (2) Locators for billing cycle card, progress bars, tooltips, info icons, value texts, (3) Action methods for navigation, clicking, hovering, printing simulation, (4) Verification methods for visibility checks, text comparisons, color validation, (5) API helpers for time shifting, billing triggers, print job registration, subscription management, (6) Constants for URLs, credentials, test data values, (7) Utility functions for waits, device detection, responsive testing, visual comparison. None of these components exist in a test configuration JSON file. The relevant components for this test case would be found in batches containing actual source code files such as page object classes, helper modules, utility libraries, configuration modules, and API client classes. This batch is purely for test orchestration configuration and has no reusable automation components for implementing the test case.
